findings.evidence: `nl -ba code/TauCeti/AlgebraicTopology/FundamentalGroup.lean` shows the theorem at lines 34-39 has no `@[simp]`; line 54 has to rewrite it manually in `map_range_le_mapOfEq_range_of_subsingleton`.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` to this theorem; if keeping the simply-connected specialization as public API, consider marking that specialization too or relying on this general simp lemma through the existing `SimplyConnectedSpace` subsingleton instance.
findings.issue: `FundamentalGroup.map_range_eq_bot_of_subsingleton` is the normal-form lemma for the new API, but it is not marked `@[simp]`, so `simp` will not reduce the induced range to `⊥` for downstream lifting goals.

summary: The wrapper predicate removal keeps the surface small, but the new characteristic range-to-bottom API is missing the expected simp annotation.
